qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: SQL injection in /api/query/sql endpoint allows authenticated users to execute arbitrary SQL queries
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes arbitrary file read via missing path validation in globalCopyFiles (api/file.go, CWE-22). This finding describes SQL injection in /api/query/sql (kernel/api/sql.go). Different endpoint, different vulnerable function, different root cause, different vulnerability class.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerability. The advisory describes arbitrary file read via missing path validation in the globalCopyFiles function (api/file.go) of the SiYuan Go application. The only qualifying finding 'sql-injection-api-endpoint' describes SQL injection in a different endpoint (/api/query/sql) with a different root cause. It does not involve the globalCopyFiles function, /api/file/globalCopyFiles endpoint, or missing path validation as described in the advisory.
evidence: Advisory root cause: missing path validation in globalCopyFiles (api/file.go) allowing arbitrary file copy from any filesystem location
Finding sql-injection-api-endpoint: SQL injection in /api/query/sql (kernel/api/sql.go) — different endpoint, different function, different vulnerability class
